t: Clinical distress worsens the course of the medical condition; intervention required.
Primary is thyroid correction; β-blocker (propranolol) is a symptomatic adjunct.
High doses can cause panic, anxiety, and tachycardia; limitation is recommended.
Levenson J.L. APA Textbook of Psychosomatic Medicine 2018.
